productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Grey Striped T-shirt
description: Style NoteOne casual garment that'll make you look sophisticated in an instant is this t-shirt from status quo. The quirky embroidery on the chest renders a subtle charm to the tee, while the soft blended fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team it with jeans and sports shoes for a touch of style.Product DetailsGrey polo t-shirt which has multi coloured stripes, ribbed spread collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, branding on the left chest and a vented hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
